✦ A REAL CONVERSATION WITH JYOTI
Should I change careers this year?
Your chart shows Saturn currently transiting your 10th house of career — this is a significant restructuring period that runs through 2027. The next 18 months will feel unstable, but they're laying the foundation for a stronger professional identity, not undoing it.

A change made in haste right now may need to be revisited. Your chart suggests waiting until March 2027, when Jupiter enters your 10th. That's your real window. If you must move sooner, choose work that builds long-term mastery over fast wins — Saturn rewards what you do patiently in this period.

How It Works

Four simple steps to your personalized reading

Enter Your Birth Details

Date, time, and place — the sky at the moment you were born.

Using Swiss Ephemeris — the same astronomical data trusted by professional astrologers worldwide.

Your AI Vedic astrologer interprets your chart in plain English, no jargon.

4

Ask Anything

Career, relationships, timing, big decisions — Jyoti answers based on your actual chart.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know

How is AstroJyoti different from other astrology apps?▼

AstroJyoti uses Swiss Ephemeris for astronomical-grade calculations, then applies AI trained in classical Jyotish texts (BPHS, Phaladeepika, Saravali). Jyoti remembers your chart and cites specific Graha, Bhava, and Dasha in every response.

Is the Kundli calculation accurate?▼

Yes. We use Swiss Ephemeris with 0.1 arcsecond precision and Lahiri ayanamsa for Vedic accuracy. Your chart is recalculated live every time, not cached like generic services. Jyoti's AI adapts to your specific chart, so readings get more personal over time.

What can I ask Jyoti?▼

Anything related to your Kundli: career timing, relationship compatibility, health periods, financial outlook, marriage muhurta, and more. Jyoti cites your specific planetary positions in every answer.

Is my birth data private?▼

Your data is stored securely in our encrypted database with row-level security — only you can access your data. We do not share or sell any personal information. No ads, ever.

What is free vs paid?▼

Seeker (free) gives you 3 questions per day to ask Jyoti, plus full Kundli with D1/D9/D10 charts, daily Panchang, 3 compatibility readings per month, basic remedies, and a 1-page Kundli PDF. Sadhak (paid plan) unlocks everything: unlimited questions, Varshphal annual forecast, Muhurta finder, all 5 Dhasa systems, all 16 Varga charts, Honest Dosha Check, unlimited PDF reports. Cancel anytime in 1 click — no hidden fees.

Do I need my exact birth time?▼

Exact birth time gives the most accurate Lagna (Ascendant). If approximate, Dasha and Rashi analysis will still be accurate, but Lagna-dependent features may vary.

How do payments work?▼

All payments are processed securely through Stripe. You can cancel anytime with no hidden fees. Plans renew monthly or annually based on your choice.

Why Jyoti and not ChatGPT?▼

ChatGPT doesn't know your chart. Jyoti has your birth data loaded and cites your specific placements in every answer. Think of Jyoti as your personal astrologer, not a general chatbot.

Can I trust Jyoti's predictions?▼

Jyoti cites your actual chart in every response — house lords, Dasha periods, planetary strengths. Every answer is grounded in your data, not generic sun-sign predictions. You can verify the placements yourself in your Kundli.

Is Jyoti like those generic horoscope apps?▼

No. Generic apps read your sun sign and give the same answer to millions. Jyoti reads your entire Kundli — all 9 planets, 12 houses, current Dasha — and every response is unique to you.

Daily Panchang

What's the energy of today?
The Hindu calendar tracks the moon's daily position and gives each day a quality. Some days favour starting things, some completing, some rest. This is today's reading for your location.
       

Today's Cosmic Alerts

Live
Why do strangers see me differently than I am?
Your birth chart shows who you are inside. Arudha Lagna shows how the world perceives you — your reputation, your public image, what people sense before knowing you. It's often surprisingly different from your inner self.

Who You Are vs How the World Sees YouArudha Lagna · Public self

My Strengths MapAshtakavarga · Energy by life domain

Where is my cosmic energy strongest?
Vedic astrology calculates a numerical "energy score" (Ashtakavarga) for each area of life. The higher the number, the more naturally favourable that domain is for you. Use this to know where to push, and where to protect.

🔮 ORACLE & MUHURTA
Ask the Sky. Time the Move.
Two ancient tools, side by side. Prashna reads the moment of your question. Muhurta finds the right window for your action.
A chart cast at the exact moment you ask — the sky's answer to your question, independent of your birth chart. Sacred, precise, instant.

Today
What are my planets doing right now?
Vedic astrology has 9 Grahas (planets) and each one rules a different part of your life — the Sun for identity, Moon for emotion, Mars for drive, and so on. Each card below tells you what that planet is doing in your chart today.
What's coming this week?
Vedic astrology maps each day's energy as the planets move through the sky. Some days favour bold action, some quiet reflection, some rest. This calendar shows what each day brings for your specific chart.

Do I really have a "dosha" to worry about?
A "dosha" is a planetary affliction in your chart. You may have been told you have Mangal Dosha, Kaal Sarp, or Nadi Dosha — often by someone trying to sell expensive remedies. Here's what your chart actually shows, the honest version, with what (if anything) is worth doing about it.
✦ The truth, not the fear
You may have been told you have Mangal Dosha, Kaal Sarp Yoga, or another dosha requiring expensive remedies. Here’s what your chart actually shows — according to classical Jyotish.
✦ Full audit of all 5 doshas
Sadhak unlocks Pitra Dosha and Grahan Dosha analysis — plus detailed cancellation factors and authentic remedy guidance for every dosha. The full picture, not just the headline.
Are we actually compatible?
Vedic compatibility (Ashtakoota Milan) doesn't just give a yes/no — it shows where you'll clash, what each of you brings, and what your charts say about the long arc of this relationship. Enter their birth details below and we'll calculate it precisely from Swiss Ephemeris.

Compatibility ReadingAshtakoota Milan · Nakshatra Milan

Am I in a good period or a difficult one?
Feeling like nothing is moving — or like everything suddenly is? That's not random. Vedic astrology divides your life into planetary periods called Dashas. Each one has a quality: some build, some test, some release. This page tells you exactly what phase you're in and when it shifts.

My Current PhaseMahadasha verdict · Antardasha shifts

Where am I in my life cycle?
Vedic astrology divides your life into planetary periods called Dashas. Each phase has its own flavour, lessons, and timing — some are expansive, some challenging, some deeply spiritual. The Vimshottari system below maps the whole 120-year arc of your life.

Life PeriodsVimshottari Dasha · the gold standard

Triple Chart ViewSudarshana · Lagna · Moon · Sun

Sadhak
In classical Jyotish, a house is considered truly significant only when all three charts (Lagna, Chandra, and Surya) agree. Sudarshana reveals your highest-significance zones: the life areas where all three perspectives converge.

Find My Exact Birth TimeLife events · Dasha correlation

₹999
Your Lagna (Ascendant) changes sign every ~2 hours. Even a 30-minute error in your birth time shifts your entire chart. Jyoti works backwards from your key life events — using your actual Dasha sequence — to determine the most probable exact time of your birth.
⚠️
Your birth time is approximate. Rectification will significantly improve the accuracy of your Lagna and all house-dependent readings.
Enter 4–8 major life events with the year they occurred. Jyoti will match them against your Dasha sequence to find the most probable birth time.
What you get
✓ Jyoti analyses your Dasha sequence against 4–8 life events
✓ Returns a rectified birth time range (±15–30 min accuracy)
✓ Identifies your probable Lagna if currently uncertain
✓ Option to save the rectified time to your profile
✓ One-time purchase — yours forever
One-time · Secure payment via Stripe · Instant access
What patterns am I carrying from past lives?
Vedic astrology reads Rahu and Ketu as the karmic axis — what your soul is moving toward (Rahu) and what it has already mastered (Ketu). The themes below are the deep patterns shaping this lifetime: the lessons you came to learn, the gifts you came in with, and the unfinished business from before.

Your Life, In Dashas

Vedic astrology maps your life as a sequence of planetary periods. Each Mahadasha lasts years to decades. Tap any period to see what Jyoti reads in it.
Loading your timeline…

Why Did This Happen?

Pick any period in your life and Jyoti will explain what your chart was doing then. The career break. The move abroad. The relationship that ended. The year everything clicked. Your chart remembers.
Reading your Sade Sati status…

What Were You Born To Do?

Vedic astrology maps career through your 10th house, its lord, your D10 (career chart), and your current Dasha period. Together they show what you're naturally meant for — and whether you're aligned with it right now.

Your Chart and Foreign Lands

For NRIs and anyone living far from where they were born: your chart has always known. The 9th house (long journeys, dharma) and 12th house (foreign lands) hold the answer to whether you were destined to cross the ocean — and what it means for you.
What are the deep themes of my life?
Sahamas are mathematically derived sensitive points in your chart, each governing a specific life theme — fortune (Punya), marriage (Vivaha), career (Karma), children, mother, father. Think of them as the secret coordinates the classical astrologers used to find what really matters for you.

Life ThemesSahamas · sensitive points by theme

3 free · all 16 with Sadhak
Punya is in your strongest house — ask Jyoti how to activate it. →

Your Annual Letter
Jyoti will write you a personalised letter for the year ahead — covering career, relationships, health, the dominant theme of your year, and the windows that open and close. Generated once per year, cached for revisits.
Why is one chart not enough?
Vedic astrology uses divisional charts (Vargas) to zoom into specific life areas. Your main chart (D1) shows the whole picture; D9 reveals marriage, D10 reveals career, D2 reveals wealth, D60 reveals deep karma. Tap any chart below to see your specialised reading for that life domain.

AstroJyoti.ai

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

AstroJyoti.ai (“we”, “our”, or “the Service”) is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data.

1. Information We Collect

We collect the following information when you use AstroJyoti.ai:

  • Account information: Name and email address collected via Google Sign-In
  • Birth data: Date of birth, time of birth, and place of birth — used solely to generate your Vedic astrological chart and personalised readings
  • Usage data: Pages visited, features used, and session duration — collected anonymously via Google Analytics
  • Payment information: Payment is processed by Stripe. We do not store your card details. We receive only a confirmation of payment and your email address.
  • Conversation data: Questions you ask Jyoti are processed to generate responses. We do not store individual chat messages beyond your current session.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To generate your personalised Vedic astrology chart and readings
  • To provide and improve the AstroJyoti.ai service
  • To process subscription payments and manage your account
  • To send transactional emails (e.g. payment confirmations) — we do not send marketing emails without your consent
  • To analyse usage patterns and improve the product

3. Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. We share data only with:

  • Anthropic: Your questions are processed by Claude AI to generate Jyoti’s responses. Anthropic’s privacy policy applies.
  • Supabase: Your account and birth data are stored securely in Supabase’s infrastructure.
  • Stripe: Payment processing. Your card details never touch our servers.
  • Google Analytics: Anonymous usage analytics. No personally identifiable information is shared.

4. Data Retention

We retain your account and birth data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your data at any time by contacting us. Upon deletion, your birth data and account information will be permanently removed within 30 days.

5. Your Rights

  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Request deletion of your account and data
  • Withdraw consent for data processing at any time
  • Lodge a complaint with a data protection authority

6. Children’s Privacy

AstroJyoti.ai is not intended for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

7. Contact Us

For any privacy-related questions or data deletion requests, contact us at: support@astrojyoti.ai

This policy may be updated from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or a notice on the platform.

AstroJyoti.ai

Terms of Service

Last updated: May 2026

By using AstroJyoti.ai, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

1. About the Service

AstroJyoti.ai is an AI-powered Vedic astrology platform. The readings, insights, and guidance provided by Jyoti are for entertainment and personal reflection purposes only. They do not constitute professional advice of any kind — medical, legal, financial, psychological, or otherwise. Always consult qualified professionals for important life decisions.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years of age to use AstroJyoti.ai. By using the service, you confirm that you meet this requirement.

3. Subscriptions & Payments

  • Sadhak subscriptions are billed monthly or annually in advance
  • Payments are processed securely by Stripe. We do not store your card details.
  • You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
  • One-time report purchases are non-refundable once the report has been generated and downloaded.
  • We reserve the right to change pricing with 30 days notice to existing subscribers.

4. Refund Policy

If you are unsatisfied with your subscription within the first 7 days of your first payment, contact us at support@astrojyoti.ai for a full refund. After 7 days, subscription payments are non-refundable.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the service for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, copy, or replicate the service
  • Share your account credentials with others
  • Use automated scripts or bots to access the service
  • Resell or redistribute readings or reports without permission

6. Intellectual Property

All content on AstroJyoti.ai — including Jyoti’s persona, the reading format, card designs, and report templates — is owned by AstroJyoti.ai. Your personal readings are yours to keep and share, but may not be resold.

7. Limitation of Liability

AstroJyoti.ai is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any decisions made based on astrological readings, or for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

8. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

9. Contact

Questions about these Terms: support@astrojyoti.ai

© 2026 AstroJyoti.ai. All rights reserved.
